name: Johannesburg (Gauteng, South Africa)
description: A white field charged centrally with the coat of arms of Johannesburg.
history: Johannesburg is the largest city in South Africa, founded in 1886 with the discovery of gold on the Witwatersrand. The city flag bears the historic coat of arms granted to the city, with elements recalling its mining origins.

features.symbolism: the historic emblem of the city
